features.description: Update installed filter commands and CLI parsing so clean and smudge receive the filtered file path.
Add git-zcrypt init-manifest with optional --path to create git-zcrypt-keys.json in the current or specified directory.
features.validation: cargo test cli::tests::parses_planned_subcommands -- --exact && cargo test --test filter_roundtrip init_manifest_creates_committed_key_manifest -- --exact

features.description: Add committed git-zcrypt-keys.json parsing, formatting, validation, initialization, and nearest-ancestor lookup.
Replace .git/git-zcrypt/index.json as the durable key-id mapping with committed manifest lookup and local key scanning.
Make clean update the nearest existing committed manifest for the filtered path with the selected key id and fail clearly when none exists.
Make smudge require the blob key id to be declared by the nearest committed manifest.
Make smudge warn and pass encrypted bytes through when the manifest authorizes the blob key id but no local key is available.
Add clone/checkout coverage showing a repo with committed manifests can be checked out without local key material.
Document init-manifest, committed manifests, clone-without-key behavior, and the validated re-smudge command after key setup.
Run formatting and the full test suite after implementation.
